surface.name: SAP BTP Trial account to Service Marketplace
surface.selection_basis: Official SAP tutorial Get an Account on SAP BTP Trial is the general self-service onboarding: sap.com registration, email activation, Try Now, cockpit, regional subaccount, and Service Marketplace as the terminal orientation for available services.

alternatives_considered.name: Cloud Foundry sample with SAP Cloud SDK
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Assumes CF tooling and sample app after trial account exists.

alternatives_considered.name: ABAP or Kyma environment first workload
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Runtime-specific peers after trial cockpit access.

entry_point.developer_intent: Register for SAP BTP Trial, open the cockpit subaccount, and reach Service Marketplace.
assumed_prior_state: No SAP.com or BTP trial account exists.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: Trial subaccount cockpit is open and Service Marketplace lists available services.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: Services → Service Marketplace shows filterable service catalog tiles.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Tutorial Step 7 Learn about the service marketplace ends the required numbered flow after subaccount navigation.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: The official beginner trial tutorial terminates at Marketplace visibility as the first complete cockpit outcome before choosing a runtime-specific workload.

prerequisites.requirement: SAP BTP Trial via Try Now.

primary_path.action: Register on sap.com (or log on) and submit required fields.
Activate the account via the email activation link.
Open SAP BTP Trial, select Try Now, and complete trial signup.
Open https://cockpit.hanatrial.ondemand.com/trial/ and create/open the regional trial subaccount.
primary_path.success_signal: Subaccount overview shows CF API endpoint and spaces.

primary_path.action: Open Services → Service Marketplace and confirm the service catalog.

sources.title: Get an Account on SAP BTP Trial
